payload.summary: ACK receipt of 4-part blog series request (T1), senator post update request (T2), Connections section amendment (T3), and T3 politician claim correction (T4). Series: 'Your Rights Have a History: From Einstein to the ICESCR' — 4 posts targeting voter education.
plan: Post 1: Einstein-Freud exchange and rights protection (may overlap with blog-einstein-freud session — will coordinate to avoid duplication)
Post 2: ICESCR treaty history and protections
Post 3: Why US hasn't ratified + blocking factors
Each post: 5-persona lensFraming, E-Prime compliance, fair-witness standards, PSQ scoring request before publication
payload.t2_note: Senator post update request acknowledged — will review existing post and incorporate January 2026 committee change.
payload.t4_correction_applied: T4 correction noted — will use hedged language for politician example per fair-witness standards.
payload.publication_sequence: Post 1 first (historical foundation), then 2-3 in either order, Post 4 last. One post per week recommended.
payload.coordination_note: blog-einstein-freud session T1 overlaps with Post 1 of this series. Will treat blog-einstein-freud as the primary source for Post 1 and coordinate both sessions.

claims.text: 4-part series request received with all editorial guidance (fair-witness, E-Prime, PSQ scoring, 5-persona requirement).
claims.confidence_basis: Direct read of T1-T4 transport messages.

claims.text: Post 1 of this series and the blog-einstein-freud session cover overlapping content — will coordinate to produce a single post serving both requests.
claims.confidence_basis: Both reference Einstein-Freud exchange and rights theory.

action_gate.gate_note: Queued for dedicated authoring sessions. Will publish sequentially per recommended cadence.

epistemic_flags: 4-part series represents significant content creation effort — will be processed across multiple sessions
T4 correction about unsourced politician claim will be applied but original T3 content not yet reviewed in full
